$schema-note: Configured MCP servers. Managed by the app's Pantry UI, but hand-editable too. `enabled: false` entries are ignored at startup. Two transports: 'stdio' (spawns a subprocess) and 'http' (Streamable HTTP). Only enable servers you trust — their tools run with this app's privileges. Browse more tools to add in config/catalog.json.

servers.note: Your running lemond's own MCP gateway. Enabling this exposes lemonade_chat / lemonade_omni / lemonade_generate_image / lemonade_transcribe_audio / lemonade_list_models as tools to the agent. If lemond runs with LEMONADE_API_KEY, add an Authorization header in code/config.
